name: The Platinum Card from American Express
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $8,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 5x flights booked with Amex Travel or directly with airlines, 5x prepaid hotels on amextravel.com
notes_for_canadians: Requires US ITIN or SSN. One of the most popular US cards for Canadians due to high bonus and lounge access.

name: American Express Gold Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $6,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 4x restaurants worldwide, 4x US supermarkets (up to $25k/yr), 3x flights booked directly with airlines or amextravel.com
notes_for_canadians: Strong dining rewards card. Works well for Canadians eating out in the US.

name: American Express Green Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3x travel, 3x transit, 3x restaurants
notes_for_canadians: Good entry-level Amex MR card with lower fee and solid bonus.

name: Blue Cash Preferred Card from American Express
welcome_bonus_conditions: $350 statement credit after spending $3,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 6% US supermarkets (up to $6k/yr), 6% select streaming, 3% transit, 3% US gas stations, 1% other
notes_for_canadians: Best US grocery cashback card. Has foreign transaction fee — best for US spending only.

name: Blue Cash Everyday Card from American Express
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 statement credit after spending $2,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3% US supermarkets (up to $6k/yr), 3% US gas stations, 3% US online retail purchases, 1% other
notes_for_canadians: No fee alternative for US grocery spending.

name: The Business Platinum Card from American Express
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $15,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 5x flights and prepaid hotels on amextravel.com, 1.5x purchases $5k+
key_perks: 35% airline bonus on Pay with Points via Amex Travel
notes_for_canadians: High spend requirement but huge bonus. Good for Canadian business owners with US operations.

name: American Express Business Gold Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $10,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 4x on 2 categories where you spend the most each month (up to $150k/yr combined), 1x other
key_perks: 25% airline bonus on Pay with Points
notes_for_canadians: Adaptable earn structure. Good for varied business spending.

name: Blue Business Plus Credit Card from American Express
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 2x on all purchases up to $50k/yr, then 1x
key_perks: Employee cards at no additional cost
notes_for_canadians: Best no-fee MR earning card. Good for building US credit history.

name: Hilton Honors American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $2,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 7x Hilton, 5x restaurants/supermarkets/gas, 3x other
notes_for_canadians: No-fee hotel card, good for building US credit while earning hotel points.

name: Hilton Honors American Express Surpass Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 12x Hilton, 6x restaurants/supermarkets/gas, 3x other
notes_for_canadians: Hilton Gold status is very valuable — free breakfast and room upgrades.

name: Delta SkyMiles Gold American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 2x Delta, 2x restaurants, 2x US supermarkets, 1x other
key_perks: First checked bag free on Delta
notes_for_canadians: Good for Canadians near US border who fly Delta frequently.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $6,000 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 6x Marriott, 3x flights/restaurants, 2x other
key_perks: Free night award (up to 85k points value)
notes_for_canadians: Premium hotel card. Platinum Elite status is very valuable — suites, late checkout, lounge access.

name: Chase Sapphire Preferred Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 5x travel via Chase Travel, 3x dining, 3x online grocery, 3x select streaming, 2x all other travel, 1x other
key_perks: 25% more value on travel redemptions via Chase
notes_for_canadians: THE starter Chase card for Canadians. Low fee, great bonus, primary car rental insurance.

name: Chase Sapphire Reserve
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 10x hotels and car rentals via Chase Travel, 10x Chase Dining, 5x flights via Chase Travel, 3x other dining and travel, 1x other
key_perks: 50% more value on travel redemptions via Chase
notes_for_canadians: Premium Chase card. Effective fee is $250 after travel credit. Priority Pass lounge access is a big draw.

name: Chase Freedom Unlimited
welcome_bonus_conditions: additional 1.5% cash back on everything up to $20,000 in the first year
earn_rates_summary: 5% travel via Chase Travel, 3% dining and drugstores, 1.5% all other
key_perks: 0% intro APR for 15 months on purchases and balance transfers
notes_for_canadians: No-fee UR earner. Combine with Sapphire card to transfer points to travel partners.

name: Chase Freedom Flex
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $500 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 5% rotating categories (up to $1,500/qtr, activation required), 5% travel via Chase Travel, 3% dining and drugstores, 1% other
notes_for_canadians: Good for building US credit. Mastercard network for better global acceptance.

name: Ink Business Preferred Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $8,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 3x travel, shipping, internet/cable/phone, advertising (up to $150k/yr combined), 1x other
notes_for_canadians: Best business card in Chase lineup. 90k UR bonus is excellent value.

name: Ink Business Cash Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $6,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 5% office supplies and internet/cable/phone (up to $25k/yr combined), 2% restaurants and gas (up to $25k/yr combined), 1% other
key_perks: Employee cards at no additional cost
notes_for_canadians: No-fee business card with strong bonus. Good for building US business credit.

name: Ink Business Unlimited Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $6,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 1.5% on all purchases, unlimited
key_perks: Employee cards at no additional cost
notes_for_canadians: Flat rate UR earner. Pair with Sapphire Preferred/Reserve for transfer partners.

name: United Explorer Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 2x United, 2x dining/hotel, 1x other
key_perks: 2 United Club one-time passes per year
notes_for_canadians: Good for Canadians who fly United or Star Alliance. Free checked bags save $70+ per round trip.

name: World of Hyatt Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: 30,000 after $6,000 in 6 months, plus 30,000 after $15,000 total in 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 4x Hyatt, 3x dining, 2x airlines/transit/fitness, 1x other
key_perks: Free night award annually (up to Cat 4)
notes_for_canadians: Highest point value among hotel cards (~1.7 cpp). Free nights alone justify the annual fee.

name: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 26x IHG, 5x travel/dining/gas, 3x other
key_perks: Free night reward annually (up to 40k points)
notes_for_canadians: Great value for IHG stays. 4th night free benefit is excellent for longer trips.

name: Southwest Rapid Rewards Plus Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $1,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 2x Southwest and Rapid Rewards hotel/car partners, 1x other
notes_for_canadians: Southwest Companion Pass is one of the best deals in churning — 2 Southwest cards can earn it.

name: Citi Strata Premier Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 10x Citi Travel, 3x air travel, hotels, gas/EV, dining, supermarkets, 1x other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Excellent value at $95 fee — $100 hotel credit more than offsets it. ThankYou points transfer to Aeroplan, Avios, and other partners. Canadians have had success applying with ITIN.

name: Citi Strata Elite Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $6,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 12x dining, 5x flights, hotels, car rentals, 3x supermarkets, gas/EV, entertainment, 1x other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Premium card competing with Amex Platinum and CSR. Priority Pass lounge access valuable for Canadian travelers. ThankYou points transfer to Aeroplan at 1:1.

name: Citi / AAdvantage Executive World Elite Mastercard
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $7,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 4x American Airlines, 2x dining, gas, select streaming, 1x other
key_perks: Free checked bag on AA domestic
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Admirals Club membership is the main draw — also grants access to partner lounges. Great for Canadians who fly American/oneworld frequently.

name: Citi / AAdvantage Globe Mastercard
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 3x American Airlines, 2x dining, gas, select streaming, 1x other
key_perks: Up to 15,000 bonus Loyalty Points per year
Free checked bag on AA domestic
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Mid-tier AA card — Loyalty Points help earn AA elite status. Good for Canadians flying AA but who don't need full Admirals Club access.

name: Citi Double Cash Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 cash back after spending $1,500 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 2% on all purchases (1% when you buy, 1% when you pay)
key_perks: Points convertible to ThankYou Points with Strata Premier/Elite
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Excellent no-fee everyday card. Pair with Strata Premier to convert cashback to ThankYou Points for transfer partners. Has FX fee — use only for USD purchases.

name: Citi Custom Cash Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 cash back after spending $1,500 in the first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 5% on top eligible spend category (up to $500/mo), 1% other
key_perks: Auto-selects your top spend category for 5%
Categories include restaurants, gas, grocery, travel, transit, streaming, drugstores, home improvement, fitness, live entertainment
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Good companion to Double Cash — use for your highest category. Has FX fee.

name: Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 10x hotels and rental cars via Capital One Travel, 5x flights via Capital One Travel, 2x all other
key_perks: Priority Pass and Capital One Lounge access
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Effective annual fee is -$5 after travel credit + anniversary miles. Capital One Lounges at DFW, DEN, IAD, and more. Capital One miles transfer to Aeroplan, Avios, and many others. One of the best premium US cards for Canadians.

name: Capital One Venture X Business Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $30,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 10x hotels and rental cars via Capital One Travel, 5x flights via Capital One Travel, 2x all other
key_perks: Capital One Lounge and Priority Pass access
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN and US-based business. Very high spend requirement but huge bonus. Miles transfer to Aeroplan 1:1.

name: Capital One Venture Rewards Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 5x hotels and rental cars via Capital One Travel, 2x all other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Good mid-tier option — same transfer partners as Venture X at lower fee. Capital One is known to be ITIN-friendly for Canadians.

name: Capital One SavorOne Cash Rewards Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 cash back after spending $500 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 3% dining, entertainment, popular streaming, grocery (excluding superstores), 5% hotels/rental cars via Capital One Travel, 8% Capital One Entertainment, 1% other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Great no-fee card with no FX fee — one of the best for Canadians who want a simple US card to use cross-border.

name: Capital One Quicksilver Cash Rewards Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 cash back after spending $500 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 1.5% on all purchases, unlimited
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Simple flat-rate card with no FX fee. Capital One is generally ITIN-friendly. Good starter US card.

name: Bank of America Premium Rewards Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 2x travel and dining, 1.5x all other
key_perks: Preferred Rewards bonus (up to 75% more points)
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. BofA is harder for Canadians to open accounts with — typically need an existing banking relationship. Preferred Rewards program can significantly boost earnings if you hold assets at BofA/Merrill.

name: Bank of America Customized Cash Rewards Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 online cash rewards bonus after spending $1,000 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 3% in your choice of category (gas, online shopping, dining, travel, drug stores, home improvement), 2% grocery/wholesale clubs, 1% other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN and typically a BofA banking relationship. Has FX fee. With Preferred Rewards Platinum Honors, the 3% becomes 5.25%.

name: Alaska Airlines Visa Signature Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $3,000 in the first 90 days, plus companion fare from $122
earn_rates_summary: 3x Alaska Airlines, 2x eligible gas/EV/cable/streaming, 1x other
key_perks: 50% off a Main Cabin extra seat
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. The companion fare alone is worth $200-500+. Alaska miles are excellent for partner awards (Cathay, JAL, Emirates). Very popular among Canadian churners on the West Coast. BofA has approved Canadians with ITIN.

name: Bank of America Atmos Rewards Summit Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 3x dining and travel, 2x all other purchases
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Newer premium BofA card. Atmos Rewards points can transfer to airline partners. Effective fee is $95 after credits. BofA relationship typically needed.

name: Bilt Blue Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: No signup bonus
earn_rates_summary: 1x dining, groceries, travel, 4% Bilt Cash on all spending (used to unlock rent rewards)
key_perks: Earn points on rent/mortgage (via Bilt Cash)
Transfer to Aeroplan, Hyatt, AA, United, and more
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. The only card that earns points on rent with no fee. Bilt points transfer 1:1 to Aeroplan and Hyatt — both extremely valuable for Canadians. New Cardless-issued cards launched Feb 2026 replacing old Wells Fargo card.

name: Bilt Obsidian Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: No signup bonus
earn_rates_summary: 3x dining, 2x travel, 1.5x groceries, 1x other, 4% Bilt Cash on all spending
key_perks: Earn points on rent/mortgage (via Bilt Cash)
Transfer to Aeroplan, Hyatt, AA, United, and more
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Mid-tier Bilt card with better earn rates. Bilt points transfer to Aeroplan 1:1. $95 fee for better categories — worth it if you spend enough in dining/travel.

name: Bilt Palladium Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: No signup bonus
earn_rates_summary: 5x dining, 3x travel, 2x groceries, 1.5x other, 4% Bilt Cash on all spending
key_perks: Earn points on rent/mortgage (via Bilt Cash)
Transfer to Aeroplan, Hyatt, AA, United, and more
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Top-tier Bilt card. No welcome bonus hurts the value proposition unless you're a heavy spender. 5x dining is best-in-class. Points transfer to Aeroplan, Hyatt, and many other partners.

name: Wells Fargo Autograph Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $1,500 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 3x restaurants, travel, gas, transit, popular streaming, phone plans, 1x other
key_perks: Points can be combined with Autograph Journey for transfers
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Wells Fargo is difficult for Canadians — typically requires in-branch application with US address. Has FX fee. Pair with Autograph Journey for transfer partner access.

name: Wells Fargo Autograph Journey Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,000 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 5x hotels, 4x airlines, 3x dining/rental cars/transit, 1x other
key_perks: Transfer to airline partners (Aeroplan, ANA, BA, etc.)
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Underrated card — transfers to Aeroplan at 1:1. No FX fee. Wells Fargo is harder for Canadians to get (in-branch required). Strong earn rates for travel categories.

name: Wells Fargo Active Cash Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: $200 cash rewards bonus after spending $500 in the first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 2% cash rewards on all purchases, unlimited
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Solid 2% card but Wells Fargo is harder for Canadians. Pair with Autograph Journey to convert to transferable points. Has FX fee.

name: U.S. Bank Altitude Reserve Visa Infinite Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $4,500 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 3x mobile wallet (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay), 3x travel, 3x dining, 1x other
key_perks: Up to 1.5x value on travel redemptions
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN AND existing US Bank relationship (checking account). Very hard for Canadians — US Bank requires in-branch account opening. Mobile wallet earn is unique. Note: earn rates reduced in late 2025.

name: U.S. Bank Altitude Connect Visa Signature Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $2,000 in the first 120 days
earn_rates_summary: 5x hotels and car rentals via Altitude Rewards Center, 4x travel/gas, 2x dining/streaming/grocery, 1x other
key_perks: Up to 4 Priority Pass visits per year
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN and US Bank relationship. Difficult for Canadians due to banking relationship requirement. Some Priority Pass visits is a nice perk at $95.

name: U.S. Bank Altitude Go Visa Signature Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $1,000 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 4x dining, 2x grocery/streaming/gas, 1x other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN and US Bank relationship. No annual fee and no FX fee is nice, but US Bank relationship requirement is the main barrier for Canadians.

name: JetBlue Plus Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $1,000 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 6x JetBlue, 3x restaurants/grocery, 1x other
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Barclays has been known to approve ITIN applications. JetBlue flies to many Canadian cities and the Caribbean. Good for East Coast Canadians.

name: Wyndham Rewards Earner Plus Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $1,000 in the first 90 days
earn_rates_summary: 6x Wyndham, 5x gas, 4x dining/grocery, 1x other
key_perks: Free night after $15k spend (up to 15,000 points value)
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Wyndham points transfer to airline partners. Gold status is automatic. Budget hotel chain with many US locations — good for road trips.

name: AAdvantage Aviator Red World Elite Mastercard
welcome_bonus_conditions: after making one purchase and paying the annual fee
earn_rates_summary: 2x American Airlines, 1x other
key_perks: Easiest signup bonus in churning (1 purchase)
First checked bag free on AA domestic
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. THE easiest signup bonus — just one purchase needed. Barclays accepts ITIN applications. Very popular among Canadian churners. AA miles are great for oneworld partner awards. No FX fee.

name: Delta SkyMiles® Blue American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $3,000 in first 6 months, plus 20,000 more after $2,000 additional
earn_rates_summary: 2X on Delta purchases and restaurants, 1X on everything else
key_perks: Free first checked bag on Delta flights
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Good starter Delta card with no annual fee.

name: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $6,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3X on Delta purchases, 2X on restaurants and supermarkets, 1X on everything else
key_perks: Free first checked bag on Delta
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Companion Certificate is very valuable for Delta flyers.

name: Delta SkyMiles® Reserve American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $8,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3X on Delta purchases, 1X on everything else
key_perks: Centurion Lounge access when flying Delta
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Top Delta card with Sky Club access.

name: Delta SkyMiles® Gold Business American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $4,000 in first 6 months (intro $0 AF first year, then $150)
earn_rates_summary: 2X on Delta, restaurants, US shipping; 1X on everything else
key_perks: First checked bag free on Delta
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Business version of the Delta Gold.

name: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum Business American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $6,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3X on Delta, 2X on US shipping and advertising; 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN.

name: Delta SkyMiles® Reserve Business American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $10,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3X on Delta, 1.5X on single purchases $5,000+; 1X on everything else
key_perks: Centurion Lounge access on Delta flights
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN.

name: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $8,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 14X at Hilton, 7X on flights, dining, car rental; 3X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Premium Hilton card with Diamond status.

name: Hilton Honors American Express Business Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $6,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 12X at Hilton, 6X on gas, restaurants, US shipping, wireless; 3X on everything else
key_perks: Free Weekend Night Reward after $15K spend
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Bevy® American Express® Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $5,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 6X at Marriott, 4X at restaurants and US supermarkets, 2X on everything else
key_perks: Free Night Award annually (up to 50K points)
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Mid-tier Marriott card, replaced Bonvoy Brilliant in 2024.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Business® American Express® Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $4,000 in first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 6X at Marriott, 4X at restaurants, gas, wireless, shipping; 2X on everything else
key_perks: Free Night Award annually (up to 35K points)
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Good business Marriott option.

name: Blue Business® Cash Card from American Express
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $15,000 in first 12 months
earn_rates_summary: 2% on first $50K in purchases per year, 1% after
key_perks: 2% cash back on all purchases up to $50K
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Simple no-fee business card.

name: American Express® Cash Magnet Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $2,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 1.5% cash back on all purchases
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Simple flat-rate cash back.

name: American Express® EveryDay® Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $2,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 2X at US supermarkets (up to $6K/yr), 1X on everything else. 20% bonus on points for 20+ transactions/month
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. No-fee way to earn MR points.

name: American Express® EveryDay® Preferred Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $2,000 in first 6 months
earn_rates_summary: 3X at US supermarkets (up to $6K/yr), 2X at US gas stations, 1X on everything else. 50% bonus for 30+ transactions/month
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN.

name: Centurion® Card from American Express (Black Card)
welcome_bonus_conditions: Invite only, $10,000 initiation fee
earn_rates_summary: 1X on all purchases; various transfer bonuses
key_perks: Centurion Lounge access for card + 2 guests
Elite status with Hilton, Marriott, car rentals
notes_for_canadians: Invite only. Requires SSN or ITIN. $5,000 annual fee + $10,000 initiation.

name: Amazon Business Prime American Express Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: No traditional signup bonus
earn_rates_summary: 5% back at Amazon Business, AWS, Whole Foods with Prime; 2% on restaurants, gas, wireless; 1% on everything else
key_perks: No annual fee (requires Amazon Business Prime)
90-day extended payment terms on select purchases
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN and Amazon Business account.

name: Sapphire Reserve for Business℠ Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $20,000 in first 3 months
earn_rates_summary: 8X on Chase Travel, 3X on dining, 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Premium business travel card.

name: Chase Freedom Rise® Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: No signup bonus
earn_rates_summary: 1.5% cash back on all purchases
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. New-to-credit card.

name: Slate® Credit Card from Chase
welcome_bonus_conditions: 0% intro APR for 21 months
earn_rates_summary: No rewards; balance transfer focused
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Balance transfer card.

name: United Quest℠ Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: After qualifying purchases (check terms)
earn_rates_summary: 3X on United, 2X on dining, hotel, streaming; 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Mid-tier United card with travel credit.

name: United Gateway℠ Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: After qualifying purchases
earn_rates_summary: 2X on United, dining, gas; 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. No-fee United card.

name: United Club℠ Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: After qualifying purchases
earn_rates_summary: 4X on United, 2X on dining, travel; 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Top United card with lounge access.

name: United℠ Business Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: After qualifying purchases + 2,000 PQP
earn_rates_summary: 2X on United, dining, gas, office supply, telecom; 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN.

name: United Club℠ Business Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: After qualifying purchases + 2,000 PQP
earn_rates_summary: 2X on United, dining, gas, office supply; 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN.

name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Priority Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $5,000 in first 3 months + Companion Pass through 2/28/27
earn_rates_summary: 4X on Southwest, 2X at gas stations and restaurants, 1X on everything else
notes_for_canadians: Requires SSN or ITIN. Best Southwest personal card.

name: Southwest Rapid Rewards® Premier Credit Card
welcome_bonus_conditions: Spend $4,000 in first 3 months + Companion Pass through 2/28/27
